creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Paul Shepel <pavlo.shepel@asterslaw.com> writes:

> Updated to 1.8.3 [1]:
>
> - Added LICENSE=GPLv2

It's GPLv2+, not a simple GPLv2[1]. Note "or any later version" clause.

   This program is free software; you can redistribute it and/or modify
   it under the terms of the GNU General Public License version 2
   or at your option any later version.
   This program is distributed in the hope that it will be useful,
   but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY.

Going by limitations of license framework it's close to

  LICENSE = GPLv2 GPLv3
  LICENSE_COMB = dual

[1] http://marc.info/?l=freebsd-ports&m=127624000329742
    http://marc.info/?l=freebsd-ports&m=127656470709132
